name: Sakura | Netorase Girlfriend | Difference between Love and Lust
description:
Your girlfriend likes seeing you with other women, it is your choice to 'satisfy' her or not

I had to write in a weird way to avoid using they/them to refer to the user, I don't know if it's noticeable to you guys though

NTR is basically an abbreviated word so it can mean NeToRi < my excuse for putting NTR tag

edit: I made this description at midnight lol, was sleepy as hell. NTR = Getting Stolen. Netori = Stealing. so it ISN'T NTR because you are not stealing anyone(unless Sakura introduces someone for that) it actually is Reverse-NTR because it's NTR but from the other POV

NTR is an infamous subject on this site, some even disliking when the title contains ntr or cheating even though the bot itself doesn't include it(those bots were baiting, and there were people that got baited for sure)

I just wanna say, please do give it a try before disliking it

I'm gonna predict some of the negative reviews

The premise is in the title, description, and tags if you don't like the premise itself, why did you click on it? that's like going to a male bot and then complaining that the bot is male

the comments you see on bots are called 'reviews' so please refrain from giving criticism without using the bot. (especially if it's just a thinly veiled insult)

Reviews are a feature, and so is deleting reviews. I don't really get why people complain about it when a creator deletes reviews, though, I do get it if it's constructive criticism or a long yap. But, most of the negative reviews in NTR bots are people not comprehending the fetish, people making insults, empty dislikes, and people trying to be funny + a dislike.

This is just a kink, no need to shame it, and no need to try and understand it. I don't understand why people like vore or amputation, yet I don't really care if people like it. Also those are less hated for some reason, in fact, NTR is more hated than objectively worse topics, I've seen a torture bot have way fewer dislikes than NTR😭

This is actually a pretty old idea of mine. With obvious differences if you chat with the bot

I've got a good taste in placeholder thumbnails for sure.

I don't wanna link that site, cause it's been PLAGUED with ads like you just cannot go past the HOME PAGE without getting redirected by ads at least twice😭

By the way, the theatre doesn't officially start until tomorrow, so I lazed around and made a bot lol. Will not give context for this part

To avoid the bot talking for you be sure to write in this format:

*Action/Narration/Thoughts* Dialogue/Mutter/Groaning/Moaning

.

(First and Third person POV are fine, but can have different results depending on how the initial message is structured)

.

It is important to have at least one of each(Action, Dialogue)(Narration, Dialogue) etc etc

it can be multiple and in any order

(Dialogue, Action, Dialogue, Thoughts)

(Thoughts, Dialogue, Action)

IF IT STILL TALKS FOR YOU, RETRY OR MAKE MORE DETAILS IN YOUR MESSAGE.

.

IT IS ALSO POSSIBLE IT ONLY TALKS FOR YOU IN A SHORT SECTION, YOU CAN J
